characters.description: The heir of Gondor's ancient kings, now moving openly toward his birthright. He takes a perilous hidden road to gather strength for the war and to come to the aid of the besieged white city in its darkest hour.
characters.name: Aragorn

characters.description: The white wizard, now the chief mover of the free peoples against the Enemy, who rides to the great city of Gondor with Pippin to help ready its defense against the coming storm.
characters.name: Gandalf

characters.description: The young hobbit, carried to Gondor by Gandalf, who out of gratitude enters the service of the city's Steward and soon finds himself caught up in the siege of Minas Tirith.
characters.name: Peregrin Took

characters.description: The proud Steward who rules Gondor in the absence of a king - wise and commanding, but stern and sinking into despair. Grief for his sons and a secret dread gnaw at his will as the enemy's armies close in around his city.
characters.name: Denethor

characters.description: The king of Rohan, restored to vigor, who answers Gondor's call for aid and gathers his riders to ride to the great battle far to the south.
characters.name: Théoden

characters.description: A noblewoman of Rohan, the king's niece, brave and chafing at being left behind to keep house while the men ride to war. Longing for a share in the danger, she rides secretly to battle in disguise among the soldiers.
characters.name: Éowyn

characters.description: The hobbit left in Rohan's keeping, likewise forbidden the ride to battle, who is carried along in secret and refuses to abandon his king when the fighting comes.
characters.name: Meriadoc Brandybuck

characters.description: The dread chief of the Enemy's ringwraiths, a lord of terror who commands the assault on Gondor. It is said no living man can bring him down, and his very presence saps the courage of those who face him.
characters.name: The Witch-king

characters.description: The Ring-bearer, a prisoner in the enemy's tower as the final stretch of the quest begins, his strength nearly spent by the burden he still carries toward the Mountain of Fire.
characters.name: Frodo Baggins

characters.description: Frodo's faithful servant, who braves the enemy's tower to rescue his master and bears him - and for a time the ring itself - onward across the ashen wastes of Mordor toward their goal.
characters.name: Samwise Gamgee
